hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams review, triage, and resolve transaction monitoring false positives by linking wallet risk data with structured case workflows and audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction monitoring reviews delay decision making
problem_description: Compliance teams face high volumes of false positive alerts that require manual investigation across disconnected KYT outputs. This slows down alert triage and creates inefficiencies in managing wallet and transaction risk cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYT provider signals, wallet risk data and transaction alerts into one unified case management workflow that streamlines false positive reviews and accelerates compliance decision making.
workflow_title: From wallet alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes wallet risk alerts through structured reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support effective false positive management.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated alerts. Structured case control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet risk alerts, transaction signals and provider outputs into structured cases with decisions and evidence for clearer review and false positive reduction.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled workflows that reduce false positives through preserved evidence and enterprise-ready deployment for audit and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help review and reduce false positive alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts connect to case review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports false positive decision logs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for managing KYT alert triage
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce transaction false positives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY aggregates and correlates provider alerts to surface relevant risks, helping compliance teams identify and reduce false positives through AI-assisted triage and structured case workflows.
faq_2_question: How are KYT alerts triaged in SFTY?
faq_2_answer: KYT alerts are routed to reviewers using configurable risk thresholds and AI support, enabling prioritized, consistent triage with linked evidence and decision logging.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence within secure workflows to support audit-ready traceability and review readiness across compliance operations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYT and wallet tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates multiple KYT, wallet screening and blockchain analytics providers to connect outputs into one controlled compliance layer without replacing existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT and screening providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing the underlying vendor systems.
final_title: Connect transaction alerts to structured case review
final_description: See how SFTY supports compliance teams in reviewing, triaging and resolving transaction monitoring false positives with audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
